## 

## **Warm Up II**

## **Adithya Gundlapalli (A19143249)**

## 

![][image1]

### **Visual Design**

* colors like red, gold, and black make it look exciting  
* looks like a classic casino machine so it feels familiar  
* the 777 is super clear so you instantly know its a win  
* jackpot at the bottom shows the main goal  
* the lever makes it feel more real and interactive

**Game Mechanics**

* just spin using button or lever  
* match symbols to win  
* random results every time  
* really fast rounds so you can keep playing  
* no learning needed, super easy

**Users**

* people who like gambling and big wins  
* casual players who just want to chill  
* busy people who want something quick  
* people who like the thrill of randomness

**Gamification**

* jackpot makes people want to keep playing  
* random rewards keep it interesting  
* almost winning makes you want to try again  
* fast loop makes it easy to keep going

**Insights**

* game is more about feeling than skill  
* super simple so anyone can play  
* winning looks and feels satisfying  
* main hook is the chance of winning, not even the win itself

**Persona**

**Name:** Adithya

**Details:**  
Adithya is a 21 year old college student. he has classes, gym, and other stuff going on so he doesn't have time for complicated games. he likes quick games he can play for a few minutes to relax. he’s competitive so even simple games feel fun if there is a goal like a jackpot. he isn't trying to gamble seriously, he just likes the feeling of maybe winning big.

**Wants and Needs**

* fast and easy gameplay  
* clear rewards like jackpot  
* simple and clean design  
* something fun without thinking too much  
* quick results after each spin

**Doesn’t Want Doesn’t Need**

* complicated rules  
* slow gameplay  
* too many ads or distractions  
* confusing systems  
* anything that feels unfair

**User Stories**

**Story 1**  
As a college student, I want a simple spin button, so that I can play quickly and relax between things

**Story 2**  
As a competitive user, I want a chance to hit a jackpot, so that I can feel excited even in a short time
